title: polygala nicaeensis subsp. peninsularis
intro: Polygala nicaeensis subsp. peninsularis is a subspecies of flowering plant in the milkwort family (Polygalaceae), native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Polygala nicaeensis subsp. peninsularis include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
